summary: Joel Spolsky announces a live recording of the Stack Overflow podcast at Microsoft's MIX 09 conference in Las Vegas. He and Jeff Atwood will record the podcast in front of a live audience at The Venetian. The post is a brief event announcement with logistical details including date, time, and location. Attendees need conference registration but not workshop registration.
key_points: Stack Overflow podcast will be recorded live at MIX 09 conference in Las Vegas
The event is scheduled for March 17, 2009 at The Venetian
Conference registration is required but workshop registration is not
money_quotes: It's 'live' in the sense that it will be recorded in front of a live audience… you!
key_insight: A brief event announcement promoting a live Stack Overflow podcast recording at MIX 09, notable mainly as a snapshot of the early Stack Overflow community-building era.
